name: Cheddar Cheese Popcorn
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Finely grated cheese (use more if you want it cheesier)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pop the popcorn.
2. Melt the butter.
3. Grind some pepper into the butter.
4. Stir the melted butter and pepper together.
5. Layer the cheese over the popped popcorn.
6. Pour the butter mixture evenly over the popcorn and salt to taste.
